focus_anchor: current focus end to end automation

outcome.reason: Patching symptom (retry) without diagnosing root cause. Verifier only logs 200 chars of extracted JSON — we cannot diagnose failures. Right shape is prevention (tighten judge prompt for shorter strict-JSON output) + observability (full raw response dumped on parse failure). Replacement TB bundles both.

why_now:
TB-228's `verification_partial` event in events.jsonl
(2026-05-15T18:30:53Z, bullet_idx=7, malformed JSON path) is the
first observed prose-judge format failure since TB-219 tightened
the classifier on 2026-05-14, and it landed in HEAD a week before
any operator will plausibly flip `AP2_AUTO_APPROVE=1`. Closing the
resilience hole now means the first real auto-approve deployment
doesn't silently accumulate partial verifications it can't
distinguish from genuine completes.
